body:
## Summary

- Make `formatExamTime` fail closed to `00:00` for malformed, non-finite, or non-numeric runtime values.
- Make `shouldAutoSubmitExam` require `examActive === true`, `submitted === false`, and finite numeric timer/count values before auto-submitting.
- Guard the exam route interval against non-finite local timer state and update runtime/content parity coverage.
- Refresh the exam e2e source-label assertions so active provenance badges and submitted UHR reference cards are both covered.

## Validation

- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test --test-name-pattern "formatExamTime|shouldAutoSubmitExam|timer|auto-submit|remainingSeconds|NaN|Infinity|finite|boolean" scripts/exam.test.js tests/content-mock-exam-runtime-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run validate:content`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2` with the existing repo `node_modules` temporarily linked into this isolated worktree
- `CI=1 NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/exam-submit-review.spec.ts --workers=1`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run typecheck -- --pretty false` with the existing repo `node_modules` temporarily linked into this isolated worktree
- `git diff --check`

## Note

The node test selector is placed before the file list above so Node filters to this runtime-input slice; placing it after test files is ignored by the local Node 24 runner and runs unrelated `scripts/exam.test.js` source assertions too.
title: [codex] Guard exam timer runtime inputs
